primary.$description: Default reading text, headings, and body copy. The workhorse text color across the site.

secondary.$description: Supporting text, intro paragraphs, and metadata that still needs to read clearly. Sits below primary in hierarchy.

tertiary.$description: De-emphasised helper text, timestamps, and captions. Use at 14px+ to hold AA contrast.

disabled.$description: Disabled labels and inactive controls only. Intentionally below AA — never use for real content.

inverse.$description: Text and icons on dark or inverse surfaces. Pair with colour/surface/inverse.

brand.$description: Brand-colored display text for a signature moment only. Use at large sizes (3:1).

link.$description: Inline links and interactive text. Calmer than brand blue and clears AA on the page background.

link-hover.$description: Hover and focus state for inline links. Darkens one step from the rest state — always keep the underline.

on-accent.$description: Label text and icons on a yellow accent fill. Always dark — yellow never carries light text. Pair with colour/accent/highlight or colour/surface/accent.

on-brand.$description: Label text and icons on a primary action fill. Pair with colour/action/default.

page.$description: The page background — the base everything sits on. Use for the body/canvas.

default.$description: Card and content-container surfaces — project tiles, case study cards, inset panels. Sits one step off the page background. Pair with colour/text/primary.

secondary.$description: Subtly recessed zones: alternating sections, code blocks, inset panels.

elevated.$description: Cards, modals, and any content container lifted above the page. Pair with an elevation shadow.

inverse.$description: Dark feature sections — a footer or a signature dark hero. Pair with colour/text/inverse.

overlay.$description: Scrim behind modals and bottom sheets. Raw RGBA for transparency. Darkens content beneath.

brand.$description: The one bold brand panel — a signature moment. Use sparingly. Pair with colour/text/on-brand.

accent.$description: Yellow highlight panel — a featured-project marker or 'available for work' banner. Rare by design. Pair with colour/text/on-accent.

default.$description: Standard input borders and visible dividers.

focus.$description: Keyboard focus ring. Pair with an offset so it stays visible against the field.

default.$description: Primary button fill — Contact me, Download CV. Pair with colour/text/on-brand.

hover.$description: Hover state of the primary action.

pressed.$description: Active/pressed state of the primary action.

disabled.$description: Disabled button fill. Pair with colour/text/disabled.

highlight.$description: Rare signature highlight: a featured-project marker or CV-download flag. Behind dark text only — never as text.

highlight-subtle.$description: Soft highlight wash, e.g. a marker behind primary text.

success-text.$description: Success confirmation text and icons, e.g. 'Message sent'. Clears AA on white.

success-surface.$description: Background of a success message block.

warning-text.$description: Cautionary helper text and icons. Distinct from the brand highlight yellow.

warning-surface.$description: Background of a warning message block.

error-text.$description: Validation errors and required-field messages. Clears AA on white.

error-surface.$description: Background of an error message block.

info-text.$description: Informational message text and icons, e.g. 'This project is under NDA'. Reuses brand blue deliberately — info is brand-flavoured here.

info-surface.$description: Neutral informational notices — background of an info message block.
